name: IBM's Itanium server goes on sale
description: CNET's Stephen Shankland reports IBM's launch of the four-processor x450 Itanium 2 server with EXA chipset, with a 16-processor Madison-based sibling planned by year end. Aberdeen Group analyst Peter Kastner argues Itanium will take material market share in 2003 even though Xeon will out-revenue it for five years, that IBM had to ship the x450 quickly after announcing AMD Opteron servers, and that IBM trails HP which is 'betting the company on Itanium'.
